VoiceMemory.title: Voice Memory
VoiceMemory.description: Represents a long-term preference, fact, or log learned by AuraOS across sessions.

content.description: The textual factual information of the memory

importance.description: Priority score of the memory on a scale of 1-5

keywords.description: Tags or keyword list for cosine similarity fallback search

/memories/{memoryId}.description: A collection containing all learned or extracted user facts and preference memories.
